user_input:
I am a 38 year old angel investor based in Mumbai. I have Rs 2 crore 
available to deploy this year across 3-4 deals. A founder reached out 
to me last week asking for Rs 45L for 9% equity in their company. 
They sent me their pitch deck and financials. I have done 6 investments 
before — 2 failed, 3 are doing okay, 1 gave me 4x returns. 
I am cautious with money. Should I invest in this company?
